hcp.analyzing: Analyzing recent publications and CRM data...
hcp.readyDesc: I can analyze Dr. {{name}}'s recent activities, publications, and trial data to prepare you for your upcoming meeting.
hcp.suggestion1: Please provide a summary of what has changed in Dr. {{name}}'s profile in the past 3 months.
hcp.suggestion2: It's my first meeting, please provide a scientific expert summary.
hcp.explanationText: Response is powered by AI. It identifies and summarizes any changes in the scientific expert's profile over the last 3 months, such as new publications, clinical trials, medical interactions or medical events, to inform the user of recent updates before their meeting.
hcp.chip1: What publications in the last 6 months?
hcp.chip2: Draft an email based on this summary

recommendation.recommendationTitle: Phase 3 STELLAR Trial: Sotatercept for the Treatment of Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension
recommendation.recommendationSubtitle: Dr. Kelly Chin presented new subgroup analysis data demonstrating consistent efficacy across all demographic groups.
recommendation.keyTakeawayText: This data supports the use of sotatercept as an add-on therapy for patients already on background therapy, regardless of their initial risk status.
recommendation.paragraph1: The primary endpoint was met with high statistical significance (P<0.001), showing a 40.8m improvement in 6MWD.
recommendation.paragraph2: Adverse events were generally mild to moderate, with telangiectasia being the most common adverse event reported in the treatment group.
recommendation.paragraph3: Long-term extension data suggests sustained clinical benefit up to 24 months.

contentStudio.welcomeMessage: Hello! I can help you with evidence-based Q&A, content creation, or material-enhanced writing. Choose a mode below to see a demo.
contentStudio.askPlaceholder: Ask a question (e.g. efficacy, safety, subgroups)...
contentStudio.demoNote: Demo: structured answer with assertion-level citations. Click [1][2] to open evidence panel.

evidencePanel.title: Evidence Panel
evidencePanel.author: Author
evidencePanel.emptyHint: Click on any highlighted text or citation to view its source evidence.
